## CCOS Main Safety Checklist

- [ ] I fetched latest `origin/main` before shipping.
- [ ] This branch is rebased on, or otherwise contains, the current `origin/main`.
- [ ] I did not force-push to `main`.
- [ ] I did not revert/delete unrelated teammate work.
- [ ] I ran the checks that match this change.

Run before pushing:

```bash
npm run guard:main
```
